\caption{Per-system human instruction-followability (1--5) vs.\ automatic IFS (0--100), from 8 raters / 370 ratings; rows sorted by human followability (best first). IFS \emph{inverts} the human ranking---it scores the fine-tuned NLLB, which humans rate least followable, highest---and saturates near its ceiling (all systems within $\sim$3 points) while humans use the full scale. Ordinal Krippendorff's $\alpha=0.41$ on the 50-item overlap block.}
\label{tab:human}
